title: Bibliophilia | Enchanted Books
description: Unique textures for every enchanted book with tons of supported mods!
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/dy1FKre.png)

**INFO:** Bibliophilia is a fairly basic texture pack that changes enchanted books to all have unique textures. It's perfect for players who prefer a vanilla-feeling and simple design for their enchanted books. Bibliophilia manages a perfect balance between pleasing design, easy recognizability, and a clean looking inventory. Hope you like it!

**Versions below 1.21.5 requires OptiFine, CIT Resewn, Forge CIT, or other mod supporting the MCPatcher CIT format**

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**CURRENT FEATURES:** This pack currently contains retextures for all vanilla enchanted books, as well as a huge range of enchanted books from many different mods as well. As of 1.16/2.0 (current release) there is support for:

<details>
